billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your plan, upgrades/downgrades and real subscription status.
billing.stripeDisabled: Stripe is disabled by environment configuration. Subscription and checkout actions are not available.

cancelPage.hint: You can try again anytime from the billing section.

successPage.syncedDescription: Your plan is updated and ready to use.
